_note: JSON can author SQL extension configuration: the 'extensions.sql' block below is translated into the same SqlExtension the C# fluent API attaches via new MsiCompiler().Use(...), emitting the SqlDatabase and SqlScript tables into the compiled MSI. (.NET runtime detection is the one extension JSON cannot author -- it is a bundle-engine feature; use the C# API, demo 32.) For the full C# equivalent see demo 31 (SQL).

downgrade.message: A newer version is already installed.
